title: DSE / CE 生物 Biology MC Answers By Year (2008一2025)
seoTitle: DSE / CE Biology MC Answers By Year · 歷屆生物MC答案  (2008一2025)
seoDescription: 歷屆 DSE / CE Biology MC Answers By Year 歷時整理 (2008–2025) ✅ 提供 HKDSE 生物 Multiple Choice 答案 + CE 會考生物 MC 答案！每一年度完整答案 Key（Answer Key）齊全，涵蓋 2025, 2024, 2023 至 2008 年 DSE 生物 MC，以及額外收錄 1990–2005 年 CE Biology MC 答案供溫習參考。
author: Jable
content:
Looking for accurate, well-organized DSE and CE Biology multiple-choice (MC) answers?

We’ve created a complete collection of Biology MC answers from 2008 to 2025, including both DSE and CE papers. Each year is clearly listed, making it easy to find the exact paper you need for practice.

Whether you're reviewing past papers, checking your answers, or analyzing common mistakes, this resource will save you time and help you study smarter.

想搵準確又易用嘅 DSE 同會考（CE）生物科多項選擇題（MC）答案？

我哋已經為你整理好 2008 至 2025 年 所有 DSE 及會考生物科 MC 部分嘅答案，按年份清晰列出，方便你快速搵到所需試卷。

無論你係想操卷、核對答案，定係分析常見錯誤，呢個資源都可以幫你節省時間，溫書更有效率。
